data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Fallback language behavior', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for fallback language behavior, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system implements this behavior effectively. This leads to a clear gap in the validation of the requirement, as the evidence does not capture any instances or tests that confirm fallback language functionality.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of fallback language behavior.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify fallback language behavior.
